metadata.description: Personal marketplace hosting the llm-wiki plugin (Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern as a Claude Code plugin).

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern as a Claude Code plugin. Bootstrap, maintain, query, research, lint, and safely delete plain-markdown personal knowledge bases. Seven slash commands (/llm-wiki:init, /llm-wiki:ingest, /llm-wiki:query, /llm-wiki:research, /llm-wiki:lint, /llm-wiki:list, /llm-wiki:rm) and one auto-loading skill. New in v0.4.2: skill auto-manages the optional qmd collection lifecycle (lazy register on first ingest, update + embed after each ingest/lint/research, remove on /llm-wiki:rm); query uses `qmd query -c <vault>` for hybrid+rerank search at scale. Users never touch qmd directly. v0.4.1: /llm-wiki:init confirms the resolved path before scaffolding when a bare name is given. v0.4.0: /llm-wiki:rm safely deletes vaults with hard safety checks; /llm-wiki:ingest detects purpose drift and offers to update purpose.md; /llm-wiki:lint checks for purpose drift across source pages. Obsidian is the reading IDE; Claude does the maintenance.
